channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Opposition Leader Jess Wilson proposes $598,000 cap for senior public service salaries
item.description: Opposition Leader Jess Wilson has pledged to introduce a salary cap of approximately $598,000 for senior Victorian public service executives if the Coalition wins government. The proposed cap would al...

item.title: Zenith Bank Officially Opens New Subsidiary in Côte d’Ivoire as Part of Pan-African Expansion
item.description: Zenith Bank Plc don announce the official launch of im new subsidiary for Côte d’Ivoire, one big step for their Pan-African expansion plan. The subsidiary wey dem license since December 2025 by the Mi...

item.title: Shooting incident on EDSA leaves two passengers hurt
item.description: A vehicle was reportedly attacked by gunfire along EDSA on April 28, 2026, leaving two of its passengers injured. Authorities are investigating the circumstances of the shooting, including whether it ...

item.title: UAE withdraws from OPEC amid regional energy and geopolitical tensions
item.description: On April 28, 2026, the United Arab Emirates announced its departure from OPEC, marking a significant shift in the global energy landscape. The UAE's exit comes amid the ongoing energy crisis triggered...

item.title: SAWS Issues Level 2 Weather Warnings for Eastern Cape Coast and Cold Conditions Inland
item.description: The South African Weather Service (SAWS) has issued Yellow Level 2 warnings for damaging winds and waves along the Eastern Cape coastline. The areas affected include East London through to Port Edward...

item.title: Young boy dies after falling from apartment window near University of Ottawa
item.description: Ottawa police and paramedics have reported the tragic death of a young boy following a fall from an apartment window on Laurier Avenue East, close to the University of Ottawa. The incident occurred on...

item.title: IEBC Confirms Closure of Voter Registration Exercise on April 28, 2026
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) has confirmed that there will be no extension for the ongoing Enhanced Continuous Voter Registration (ECVR) exercise, which is scheduled to c...

item.title: Thales Confirms Manufacturing Issue in Lunar Gateway Modules Involving Corrosion
item.description: NASA recently revealed that the two habitation modules built for the Lunar Gateway have suffered from corrosion, a problem that had been kept under wraps until the disclosure by Administrator Jared Is...

item.title: NLC President Says ₦1 Million Salary Won't Help Workers Without Stable Naira
item.description: The Nigeria Labour Congress (NLC) President, Joe Ajaero, don talk say make e no matter if worker dey earn ₦1 million per month if the naira no strong and the economy no stable. E yan say workers dey m...

item.title: The Global Culture and Contradictions of Football Ultras
item.description: Football ultras, once confined to Italian stadiums, have become a global phenomenon since the late 1960s, celebrated for their spectacular displays and intense loyalty. Ragnhild Ekner’s documentary 'U...

item.title: LHC Denies Interim Relief to PTI Leaders in May 9 Cases
item.description: On Tuesday, the Lahore High Court (LHC) division bench, comprising Justice Syed Shahbaz Ali Rizvi and Justice Tariq Mahmood Bajwa, rejected applications by PTI leaders Ejaz Chaudhry and Mian Mahmoodur...

item.title: Ruto Hands Over New Classrooms at Raila Educational Centre and Pledges Teacher Employment
item.description: Raila Odinga Junior welcomed President William Ruto to Kibra during his visit to the Raila Educational Centre, where the president officially handed over eight newly constructed classrooms. The new fa...

item.title: Auditor-General Considers Holding Mangaung Municipal Manager Financially Liable for Mismanagement
item.description: Mangaung municipal manager Sello More faces possible personal liability for financial losses after the Auditor-General (AG) issued a notice of consideration to issue a Certificate of Debt (CoD). If gr...

item.title: India Condemns Mali Terror Attacks and Calls for Regional Peace
item.description: The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) of India has strongly condemned the recent terrorist attacks across multiple locations in Mali. In its official statement issued on Tuesday, India expressed deep...

item.title: James Slipper praises Christchurch's Te Kaha Stadium after Super Round
item.description: James Slipper, the most-capped Australian rugby player, has praised Christchurch's new Te Kaha Stadium as one of the finest stadiums he's ever played in. The Brumbies prop highlighted the lively atmos...

item.title: Latest Key Headlines in the Philippines and Worldwide
item.description: Today’s news covers a mix of political, legal, international, and entertainment developments. Former Ako Bicol representative Zaldy Co is seeking political asylum in France after leaving the Czech Rep...

item.title: UAE Announces Exit from OPEC and OPEC+ Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has decided to quit OPEC and the wider OPEC+ alliance, according to its Energy Minister Suhail Mohamed al-Mazrouei. This development comes at a critical time when the ongoing ...

item.title: Canada Post faces major financial challenges amid declining mail usage
item.description: Canada Post reported a $1.57 billion loss before tax for the 2025 fiscal year, highlighting the severe financial difficulties the Crown corporation faces. Already reliant on federal loans totalling $2...

item.title: Canada maintains unbeaten record with extra-end win over Italy at mixed doubles curling worlds
item.description: Canada’s mixed doubles curling team, comprised of Kadriana Lott and Colton Lott from Gimli, Manitoba, secured a narrow 6-5 victory over Italy’s reigning world champions Stefania Constantini and Amos M...

item.title: Atletico Madrid dey look for win against Arsenal after Copa del Rey loss
item.description: Atletico Madrid and their coach, Diego Simeone, dey try shake off the pain of their recent Copa del Rey final loss as dem prepare to host Arsenal for Champions League semi-finals. Fans still dey bitte...
